text:
On 16.07.2010 07:30, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of java/eclipse-ocl,
>
> Please note that PR ports/148667 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/148667
>
>    
I approve the patch. But the portrevision should also incremented.
